description: Worked as Senior Software Engineer at Planet
Key responsibilities and achievements to be detailed
Worked alongside the UI software engineers to develop React components to the order processig portal module
Joined a new team that owned a readmodel services that handled customer and order information that was also integrated with Salesforce
Worked on multiple microservices that handled courier integration within the platform (DHL, UPS, FedEx)
Joined the API Champions group that provided guidance and validated cross-team API-first designs, having a close contact with the platform architecture team
Contributed to the CI/CD setup of the new microservices created by the team (Jenkins Declarative Pipelines)
Kept working on the previous team that I've been assigned on the Plug-in Programme
Took more responsibilities within the team, handling more tasks and also been assigned to handle releases
Later was asigned to be part of the on-call schedule and I've handled and documented production incidents that occured during on-call
Worked also on a product, within the team ownership, that was a portal module that had dashboards which displayed merchant KPIs
Plug-in Programme where recent graduated students where selected based on multiple interview rounds
Had intensive onboarding weeks to introduce new joiners to tools and industry best practices
Been part of a team that developed a portal module focused on the merchant orders processing
Built an enterprise expenses app using PowerApps
Built an expenses reporting backoffice with categorization and manager approval connected to the app
